hypothesis: Composing conditional scores from three metastable states in ASTRA's Score-Based Interpolation will enable a priori identification of multi-step reaction intermediates and their sequential transition states such that, for a prototypical A→I→B reaction, ASTRA recovers both TS_A→I and TS_I→B whose sampled ensembles have mean committor within 0.05 of 0.5 and at least 80% of samples with committor in [0.4,0.6].
